title: Newthinking Garden Broom Outdoor Heavy Duty, Yard Brush with 19.7” Hard Bristle Brush Head, Large Stiff Sweeping Brush Outdoor for Cleaning Garden, Yard, Driveway
features: Heavy Duty Yard Broom: Our outdoor brooms are made with durability in mind, this patio broom is equipped with a sturdy and wide stiff-bristled brush head as well as a 4-section heavy-duty steel handle that is easy to assemble and sturdy enough, this combination ensures that the broom can withstand any heavy-duty outdoor cleaning task and will last for many years

Durability and Functionality: Garden brooms are made of high quality stiff bristles, rubber squeegee, and heavy duty handles. Yard brooms can be used for a long time without bending or deforming. Wet or dry cleaning can be used as needed. A stiff brush can help you remove heavy dirt and debris from your yard, and the built-in squeegee makes it easy to squeegee off sewage

Adjustable Handle: The outdoor garden broom handle can be detached and attached, the handle is divided into four parts, you can adjust the handle length according to the needs of the cleaning task, the 150cm extra-long handle makes cleaning easier, no need to bend over. The handle is wrapped in a soft sponge jacket to protect your hands during heavy-duty cleaning

Hard Bristled Yard Brooms: Our outdoor garden brooms come with 5 layers of stiff bristles, making them perfect for sweeping leaves and other heavy-duty dirt from your yard. It retains its shape even after the toughest outdoor cleaning work, and in addition, it is suitable for use in wet or dry conditions and does not rot and deform like a wooden broom

50cm Large Push Broom Head: This push broom has a 50cm wide broom head, which can cover more areas at once, and you can quickly clean the floor to save time. The push broom is ergonomically designed at 45° and can be used for push sweeping, making cleaning more labor-intensive

Multifunctional Garden Broom: Yard brooms are suitable for wet or dry environments, and the hard synthetic bristles and bristle bodies won't rot or mold like wooden brooms, making them the perfect outdoor broom for cleaning garages, patios, gardens, patios, decks, driveways, and more
